title: Ada County Cuts Ribbon on Landfill Natural Gas Facility, but Some Gas is Already Flowing
content: A new natural gas treatment plant at the Ada County Landfill has started Production and a small amount of the captured and cleaned Landfill Natural Gas (LNG) from the facility is already entering the commercial pipeline. Texas-Based Bio Gas is the company behind the project. County expects to bring in about $1 million a year in royalties - revenue that will help keep landfill fees low.
author: Analysts Account
